feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Drop down option for custom field
entry.content:
How to apply value help for custom field using custom business object and viewed it in custom analytical Query?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Request additional Special G/l indicator in SAP s/4hana cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We already knew that there is no way to config additional special g/l indicators in SAP S/4hana cloud, public edition. But we just wanted to know if there will be costs or fees if we directly request to SAP  additional spcl g/l indicators necessary for the client's business? 

Thank You

Regards, 

Melle 

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: standard list of scope items for the MM
entry.content:
Hello,

Could you please let me know where I can find a standard list of scope items for the MM module, including various types of procurement documents and material type management? I am new to the MM module and am unsure where to start my studies. I have already reviewed scope items J45, 1XF, BNX, BMD, and BMK. Are there any other essential basics that I might have missed?

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Bank Integration for Incoming receipts (2YM) - Payment Message Handling
entry.content:
How to process the incoming files from the Bank in the application scope 2YM (Application Interface to Retrieve Payment Files).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: HU selection in outbound delivery
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I need your assistance with an issue related to the selection of handling units in outbound delivery.

The context is as follows:

Our customer's packaging operations take place at a completely different time from the shipping process. As a result, handling units are created well in advance of shipping, and even well in advance of all sales orders. The HUs will be associated with the item when the picking task is processed.

This management approach requires us to ensure that the operator can manually select the "Source handling unit" during the picking task. However, in the current system, it is not possible to manually define the "Source handling unit."

The objective is twofold: first, the system must be able, based on the handling units created in advance, to automatically suggest a unit for an item during the picking task. Secondly, the operator should be able to manually select a unit to assign to the product if the suggested unit does not meet the specified requirement.

Do you have any ideas on how to deal with this ?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Consolidation process
entry.content: How to define Consolidation unit types? percentages were set on Company level but we don't see the effect of this during our consolidation process on S4Hana public cloud 2408

entry.title: Update language of sales order item description and billing document item description
entry.content:
Dear community,

System: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 2408

I have created a sales document, e.g. a sales order for a customer. In the business partner the country and standard communication language are set to DE for German language.

The text for the item description (from material master) in the sales order will now appear in DE language on all sales documents including billing documents. Even if I change language in the output items to EN the item description will always be displayed in the language of the customer, the rest of the form will change to EN.

Now I change the country and language of the customer e.g. to US and EN. All new sales documents and billing documents will be printed with EN item description taken from material master.

BUT: The old sales documents will still be printed with DE item description, the same is valid for new billing documents created from old sales documents after the change language in customer master. 

How can I change this behavior? There is an option for price updates, how can I mass update the item description in existing sales documents and downstream documents?

The system must always use the latest language entry from the business partner to determine the item language for description from material master.

Thank you.

BR

Dirk

entry.title: 403 Forbidden Error when trying to access to the tile on my QA environment - SAP Cloud Public
entry.content:
Hi, basically I built an app using the ABAP2UI5 Repository, we are working on HANA Public Cloud environment and everything went OK in DEV tenant, we ran it and I created a custom tile to execute the HTTP Service. After some tests we moved everything to Test Tenant, transports and software collection import went OK, but when we tried to execute our custom tile in Test, it throws a 403 Forbidden error, also we tried with the Http handler URL and the DEV URL (changin tenant ID), but the same error shows up.

Had someone a similar problem when tried to move their APP to another tenant? We created an App sent by SAP, so it is supposed to run in PRD tenant. Have we forgot something in the process after transport? maybe somo authorizations.

entry.title: Modification of Purchase Requisition item custom field based on the material group .
entry.content:
Hii

I have created a custom field in Purchase requisition item level in public cloud . I have three values in the dropdown , namely HIGH ,MEDIUM and LOW . I want the system to display the values HIGH , MEDIUM and LOW in the custom field based on the material group of that line item.

If you have any alternative solution to this scenario please do share .

Thanks

Shraddha

entry.title: Not Able to create logos or Texts in output management of S4HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

i am getting the above information like changes are not possible. the Add is not enable while i am trying to create. this is happening in the Customizing Starter. 

please help me with this.

entry.title: How can I Access ADLC in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

How am i able to access the Adobe Live Cycle Designer in the PS4HANA Public Cloud.

Thank You.

entry.title: How to add fetch multiple lines of record from a CDS view in a BADI and show it in adobe form
entry.content: In SAP Public cloud, I want to fetch multiple lines of record from a CDS VIEW inside a BADI and then show those values in a table inside adobe form. The problem is, the BADI executes only once, and I am able to fetch only one record at a time and show it in the adobe form, what I need is to fetch multiple records at once and display them all in the adobe form template

entry.title: KSW5- Public CLoud WBS to WBS
entry.content: In the GUI system, we could select the receiving WBS and sending WBS with KSW1. Then we could perform the deployment with KSW5. How can I do this in the Public Cloud system?

entry.title: Public Cloud - CDS - SAC - Authorization Issue
entry.content:
Hi All,

I want to extract data both in Live and Data Acquisition mode for my SAC Report. It is a public Cloud edition and the extraction I need have specific needs so I chose eclipse to build the CDS (CDS Name is ZTEST). Data preview is good. So

STEPS I FOLLOWED:

1. Create a CDS View ZTEST ( it calls I_GLAccountLineItem) it has certain authorization objects (Not sure whther these authorization automatically extends to the calling CDS ZTEST) 

2.  I created a Service Definition to my newly created CDS View (ZTEST_SERVICE).

3. I created two different Service Bindings. One with InA - UI and OData V2 - Web API (2 Bindings)

4. OData V2 - Web API created a Service URL (/sap/opu/odata/ZTEST) and an Entity Set and Association as ZTEST.

- OData Service URL with full path extracts data in the browser (I think this as a minimum guarentee to bring data to SAC) 

- When I try to create a Data Acquisition model it showed the query, let me Build Odata Service Query and when I try to create the query , I got an error 

The user does not have permission to access the requested resource.
Correlation ID: 30444370-1995-4409-9954-495703651595
(May be this is very specific to the user not having access to the underlying CDS Access? Not sure)
5. InA - UI created a familiar External Service name with 2CZTEST

   Live Data Model attepmpt - External Service name 2CZTEST shows up and upon selection it flashes the key figure value (model is still building) and throws an error:   

Server Error: Error [Server]: You do not have start authorization for R3TR INA1 ZTEST_DDL2_INA_BINDING, return code 4.
Correlation ID: 40361062-2532-4327-9467-617666356051
 
Appreciate all the help I can get.
 
Thank you,
Arthur.

entry.title: S4 Public Cloud: CDS view for batch characteristics values
entry.content:
Hello all!

We are in public cloud and have a simple requirement - to create a CDS view with the following outputs:

- Batch Number

- Characteristic

- Characteristic Values

I have been exploring all available data views, the closest I have found is: I_ClfnObjectCharcValForKeyDate

With this view the output am getting is:

And this does not give me what we need. 

Could you please recommend other views which I can turn into a CDS view just to get the batch characteristics?

Thank you

Snigdhodeep

entry.title: Will 'Refund Control' = 'Create Credit Memo Request' trigger the 'Credit Memo Request' Workflow?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We are about to implement the 'Credit Memo Request' workflow, and are wondering:

  • Does a Customer Return trigger this approval process when Item Refund Control = 'Create Credit Memo Request'?

We are hoping this will be the case because many Credit Memos for Returns are for higher values than they should be (appropriate deductions are not being made), and an Approver is expected to check that a Credit Memo is correct before posting occurs.

We don't want to implement an Approval Process on Customer Returns as not all Returns result in a Credit Memo. We plan to direct Users to only select 'Create Credit Memo Request' so long as the approval process is triggered.

As always, any insight is much appreciated. Thank you.

Kind regards,

Tu

entry.title: Standard export to spreadsheet functionality in eclipse for sap S/4HANA Cloud public edition
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to know how to enhance standard export function. *sap public cloud in eclipse

ex: If the product name: 111  ,then output csv : 0000000111  (char(10))

For purposing to upload and download spreadsheet.

Thanks

Best regards,

Eric
